full_text:
Xun Yue (Zhongyu) 荀悅 (仲豫)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xun Yue (荀悅), styledZhongyu (仲豫). Discussed scholarly matters with Emperor Xian, wrote histories that argued for restoring of the Han. Xun Yue was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and the Wei Kingdom. Xun Yue lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
